jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Testbook
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
